roles.notes: Preserves the repository review, its explicit access limits, favorable findings, maintenance flags, and the overbroad characterization of PR #84.
Shows Claude withdrawing or narrowing several repository-review claims, including the PR #84 Pair-001 characterization.
Shows Claude challenging an inferred internal mechanism and objecting to formal transition logs that exceed observable text.
Shows Claude retaining the artifact-grounded PR #84 correction while withdrawing confidence in its own causal self-report and distinguishing the exploratory thread from Pair-001.

role_binding_rules: A textual correction is observable; an internal state reset is not established by the correction text alone.
A model self-report about why it generated an output remains attributed text, not verified causal evidence.
A dissenting reviewer statement does not erase the earlier statement or the analyst's interpretation; all remain separately inspectable.
The exploratory CAD review thread must not be represented as Pair-001 execution.
